reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y rápido para tomar o comer algo de paso a la costa o a su regreso

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and quick to grab a bite to eat on your way to the coast or on your way back

reviews.comment:
No toman la AppYPF. Pareciera un chiste si no fuera realidad. De todos modos la atención del personal es bastante amable.

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept the YPF app. It would seem like a joke if it weren't true. Anyway, the staff is quite friendly.

reviews.comment:
Menos mal que renovaron las mesas y las sillas! Es otro lugar, era lo que tenian que hacer y lo hicieron!
Es buen lugar para hacer parada y comer algo..
Las medialunas RIQUISIMAS.

(Translated by Google)
Thank goodness they renovated the tables and chairs! It's a different place, it was what they had to do, and they did it!
It's a good place to stop and get something to eat.
The croissants are DELICIOUS.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmNnM3czdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy recomendable! Buena mercadería y buen funcionamiento del lugar en un entorno muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended! Good merchandise and a well-run place in a very pleasant environment.

reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia. Servicio mecánico deficiente. No tienen fosa para revisar el vehículo. Llegamos 23.55 hs y nos atendieron en el negocio porque cierran a las 0 hs

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience. Poor mechanical service. They don't have a pit for inspecting vehicles. We arrived at 11:55 PM and were served inside the shop because they close at midnight.

The ideal stopover on your travels.
